programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 3.6m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 29.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.7m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that 2.7m swell and cross-shore wind, today's Molhe Leste session sounds like a recipe for closeouts and sand in places you didn't know existed.
🌊 Swell: 2.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 2.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
